description: Consolidate the three wiki skills (/wiki-ingest, /wiki-query, /wiki-lint) into one parameterized /wiki <ingest|query|lint> dispatcher that owns its corpus, and relocate the wiki data from top-level wiki/ into the skill dir at .mifune/skills/wiki/corpus/ (entity pages) + corpus/raw/ (snapshots), gitignored-by-default with curated entries whitelisted via git add -f. Proof-of-concept for the 'skills own their artifacts' primitive; memory (reserved /memory builtin) and the spec-* family are out of scope. Built directly by an Advisor orchestrating /delegate executors for the mechanical sweep, verified by a 2-critic adversarial pass, shipped as ready PR #319 (all CI green, MERGEABLE/CLEAN).

userStories.title: Merge wiki-* into one /wiki dispatcher
userStories.description: Replace the three standalone wiki skills with a single thin dispatcher that routes the first $ARGUMENTS token to references/{ingest,query,lint}.md.
acceptanceCriteria: .mifune/skills/wiki/SKILL.md dispatches ingest|query|lint to references/<sub>.md; frontmatter name: wiki, valid argument-hint + allowed-tools; schema pointer is .mifune/skills/wiki/references/schema.md (no context/rules/wiki.md, which does not exist on this base).
references/{ingest,query,lint}.md are lifted from the old SKILL.md bodies with only documented path/name rewrites; schema + four research docs moved under references/.
The three wiki-* skill dirs are deleted; /wiki resolves through .claude/.pi/.codex skill symlinks.
userStories.notes: Done. Critic-A confirmed dispatcher correctness + reference-doc fidelity after fixing the lifted-header double-path.

userStories.title: Relocate corpus + gitignore-by-default
userStories.description: Move the corpus into the skill dir and make it local-by-default with a whitelist model.
acceptanceCriteria: 31 entity pages + 19 raw snapshots + 2 READMEs git-mv'd to .mifune/skills/wiki/corpus/ and corpus/raw/ (history preserved); the 50 tracked files stay tracked.
.gitignore ignores .mifune/skills/wiki/corpus/* and exempts corpus/README.md, corpus/raw/, corpus/raw/README.md; a new scratch entry is ignored while tracked entries stay tracked.
corpus README anchors carry the gitignore-by-default note and point at .mifune/skills/wiki/references/schema.md.
userStories.notes: Done. Critic-B verified gitignore semantics + that git add -A re-staged the rename-then-edited READMEs (avoiding stale index content).

userStories.title: Repoint coupled probes + cross-ref sweep
userStories.description: Move the two data-path-coupled probes in lockstep and rewire all live consumer references.
acceptanceCriteria: wiki-readme-index.sh reconstructs the index from the git-tracked corpus set; repo-map-contract.sh's three raw-path asserts repoint to .mifune/skills/wiki/corpus/raw/; both PASS.

AGENTS.md (3 rows -> 1 /wiki row, mermaid groom node, B-state list), REPO_MAP.md, context/README.md, autopilot OWNED_PATHS, and the live wiki-* cross-refs across ship-spec/spec-*/teach/retro/harness-audit/imagine/strategic-proposal/prompt-miner are repointed.

Conceptual wiki/memory (harness-audit) and wiki/docs (teach) tokens preserved; historical records (roadmap M3 tables, CHANGELOG, dated MEMORY/IDENTITY lessons, tasks/, eval fixtures) keep as-of-then refs.
userStories.notes: Done. 9 trap-free files via 2 /delegate executors; 8 nuanced files by the Advisor. Critic-B caught a missed ls "$AUDIT_ROOT/wiki/" (grep blind spot) — fixed.

userStories.title: Verify + ship ready PR
userStories.description: Full probe suite green, no RESULTS.md churn, PR opened to development.
acceptanceCriteria: Full eval suite 56 PASS / 1 SKIPPED (env) / 0 REGRESSION; no probes added/removed so RESULTS.md is untouched.
PR #319 to development is MERGEABLE/CLEAN with all CI gates green (Boot Path Lint, Eval Probe Regression Gate, Lint/Typecheck/Build/Test, GitGuardian).
Stops at the human merge gate; no auto-merge.
